# {{game name}} — Voice Cards

<!-- One card per major character. /plan-narrative creates the initial set from the narrative plan.
     /dialogue-write adds cards when new characters appear in a beat; it also updates a card when
     voice drift is detected during drafting.

     A character without a card must not appear in dialogue — redirect to /plan-narrative first. -->

---

## {{Character Name}}

**Three adjectives:** {{adjective 1}}, {{adjective 2}}, {{adjective 3}}

<!-- Choose adjectives that are in tension with each other, or that would produce different-sounding
     lines than any other character's adjective set. "Brave, kind, smart" doesn't distinguish anyone. -->

**Sample line:**
> "{{A single line of dialogue that only this character would say — demonstrating all three adjectives.}}"

<!-- Distinguishability test: if a reader saw only this sample line, could they identify the character? -->
